audio.description: Audio file to transcribe (MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, AAC, M4A).
audio.title: Audio

model.description: Model version. scribe_v2 is latest with improved accuracy.
model.title: Model

language_code.description: Language code (e.g., 'eng', 'spa', 'fra'). Leave empty for auto-detection.
language_code.title: Language Code

diarize.description: Enable speaker diarization to identify who is speaking.
diarize.title: Diarize

tag_audio_events.description: Tag audio events like laughter, applause, music, etc.
tag_audio_events.title: Tag Audio Events
